name: ContainerElement
summary: The ContainerElement class defines container elements. A container element is a mark element that has a frame and contains other mark elements. A container element may also contain container elements to achieve nested frames.

constructors.name: ContainerElement
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the ContainerElement class

methods.name: Add
methods.summary: Adds a new element base to the end of the list.

methods.name: Clear
methods.summary: Removes all elements from the container instance.

methods.name: CopyTo
methods.summary: Copies the elements of the ICollection to an Array, starting at a particular Array index.

methods.name: GetEnumerator
methods.summary: Returns an enumerator that iterates through a collection.

methods.name: GetUnformattedString
methods.summary: Returns the content as a string without formatting.

methods.name: IsEqual
methods.summary: Compares the current object with an object of the same type.

properties.name: Count
properties.summary: Gets the number of elements contained in the ICollection.

properties.name: Frame
properties.summary: The frame of the container element.

properties.name: IsSynchronized
properties.summary: Gets a value indicating whether access to the ICollection is synchronized (thread safe).

properties.name: SyncRoot
properties.summary: Gets an object that can be used to synchronize access to the ICollection.
